parameters.content:
## Person 3 — AI Test Generation
Ang Yi Jie, Ivan, A0259256U

Receives coverage gap data from Person 2 (Repo Loader + Coverage Analysis).
For each file with missing/low coverage:
  1. Fetch source from GitHub
  2. Generate Jest tests via OpenAI (MS1)
  3. Format test file [Code Node]
  4. Generate edge cases via OpenAI (MS2)
  5. Merge + validate schema [Code Node]
  6. Push to GitHub branch

## Person 3 MS1
AI Generation Node
+
Code Node (Format Test File)

## Person 3 MS2
Edge Case Generation
+
Code Node (Validate Schema)

nodes.name: Webhook (from Person 2)
nodes.notes:
Receives Person 2's Rule based filter output.
Expected body: { valid_files, rejected_missing_tests, removed_low_coverage }

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', max_tokens: 4096, temperature: 0.2, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.userPrompt }] }) }}

nodes.name: Generate Unit Tests (GPT-4o)
nodes.notes: Person 3 — AI Generation Node (MS1). Calls OpenAI GPT-4o.

nodes.name: Format Test File
nodes.notes: Person 3 — Code Node (Format Test File) MS1.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', max_tokens: 2048, temperature: 0.2, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.edgeSystemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.edgeUserPrompt }] }) }}

nodes.name: Generate Edge Cases (GPT-4o)
nodes.notes: Person 3 — AI Generation Node (MS2). Edge cases via GPT-4o.

nodes.name: Validate Test Schema
nodes.notes: Person 3 — Code Node (Validate Schema) MS2. Rule 1: Jest format. Rule 2: No empty tests. Rule 3: Valid imports.
